title: Add read-only carto stats CLI command
description: Register a read-only stats command in src/cli.ts using the existing commander .command().description().action() pattern (modeled on list). Action loads the graph via load(), derives counts via graphStats(graph), and console.logs a single line <n> nodes, <m> edge(s) with independent singular/plural for both counts (e.g. 2 nodes, 1 edge). chalk for success output; no save(); no new flags. Pluralisation lives in cli.ts.
